completion_formula: minimum(mandatory source, requirement, artifact, test_or_waiver, evidence, connected_staging, production, acceptance gate percentages)

blocks.name: Truth denominator and persistent Knowledge Fabric
blocks.exit_gate: Persistent connected source graph, complete counted denominator and passing no-gaps verifier

blocks.name: Sovereign control plane, security and operations
blocks.exit_gate: Enforced connected-runtime policies plus proven backup, restore and rollback

blocks.name: Model router, intelligence fabric and capability sourcing
blocks.exit_gate: Current connected routing, evidence-ranked retrieval and maintained quarantine decisions

blocks.name: Command Centre and operator UX
blocks.exit_gate: Truthful connected staging dashboard with tested operator journeys and failure states

blocks.name: Automation, integration and persistence
blocks.exit_gate: Signed connected staging canaries with persistence, retry, replay protection and rollback evidence

blocks.name: CFO, trading research, revenue and product domains
blocks.exit_gate: Expanded domain services and approved connected staging proof; no unsupported revenue or trading claims

blocks.name: External P0 recovery and provider gates
blocks.exit_gate: Each task DONE_VERIFIED or remains BLOCKED with exact owner action

blocks.name: Full staging federation
blocks.exit_gate: Critical connected paths pass end-to-end and disaster-recovery tests

blocks.name: Final reconciliation and owner acceptance
blocks.exit_gate: All in-scope items DONE_VERIFIED or owner-accepted WAIVED

passes.name: Historical bounded batches
passes.remaining: Process every newly accessible archive and preserve missing-source blockers

next_safe_pass.name: Local resilience and deterministic federation
micro_slices: Knowledge Fabric backup and verified restore
durable local queue with retry and dead-letter quarantine

truth_boundary: Pass completion is limited to the recorded bounded scope. It is not connected staging, production, complete historical source coverage or owner acceptance.
